use_codes.desc: METHOD OF DIAGNOSING TUMORS USING POSITRON EMISSION TOMOGRAPHY
POSITRON EMISSION TOMOGRAPHY DIAGNOSTIC AGENT IN ADULTS WITH SUSPECTED PROSTATE CANCER RECURRENCE BASED ON ELEVATED BLOOD PROSTATE SPECIFIC ANTIGEN LEVELS FOLLOWING PRIOR TREATMENT
